title: Intent Classifier Rules
description: Contract schema for rule-based intent classification configuration. Rules are evaluated in priority DESC order; the first match returns a ClassificationResult. Schema enforces structural invariants; loader enforces semantic invariants (duplicate rule_id rejection, regex compile validation) not expressible in JSON Schema alone.

rules.description: Priority-ordered rule set. Loader reorders by priority DESC. Duplicate rule_id values are rejected at load time (not JSON Schema representable).

default_workflow_id.description: Fallback workflow when use_default strategy is selected. Schema conditional below enforces non-null when fallback_strategy=use_default.

fallback_strategy.description: Behaviour when no rule matches the input. error_on_no_match: classify() returns None. use_default: requires default_workflow_id non-null; classify() returns ClassificationResult(default_workflow_id, confidence=0.0, matched_rule_id='__default__', match_type='default'). llm_fallback: classify() raises NotImplementedError in PR-A2; implementation ships in PR-A6 under the optional [llm] extra.

rule_id.description: Unique identifier within the rules array. Loader rejects duplicates with IntentRulesCorruptedError(reason='duplicate_rule_id').

workflow_id.description: Target workflow for this rule. Matches workflow-definition.schema.v1.json::workflow_id pattern.

workflow_version.description: Optional SemVer pin. When absent, registry resolution uses highest SemVer across bundled+workspace (source precedence only for identical keys).

priority.description: Higher value evaluated first. Loader sorts rules DESC by priority; same-priority rules MUST have distinct rule_id (enforced by uniqueness). Two rules at identical priority both matching the input surface as IntentRulesCorruptedError(reason='duplicate_priority_match') at runtime.

match_type.description: Match strategy. keyword: ASCII whole-word match against input (case-insensitive via re.IGNORECASE). regex: any pattern in regex_any matches. combined: both keyword hit AND regex match required. Unicode boundary follows Python re.UNICODE default (documented limitation for v1).

keywords.description: Required when match_type in [keyword, combined] (schema conditional below).

regex_any.description: Required when match_type in [regex, combined]. Patterns compiled at load with re.IGNORECASE; compile failure raises IntentRulesCorruptedError(reason='regex_compile').

confidence.description: Confidence score propagated to ClassificationResult when this rule matches.

description.description: Optional human-readable rationale; not used in matching.
